counters.description: [i would use the first strike page in this lane, and start doran's ring.] avoid trading with akshan at all costs, and just try to get through lane without dying. be very careful if you don't see akshan on the map as getting jumped from stealth can be a death sentence for continued laning. remember that the length of akshan's boomerang is extended through minions, and that akshan's ultimate can be blocked by minions, towers, and allied champions.

synergies.description: alistar's kit is incredible for fights in the botlane with ziggs, having so much crowd control that makes it trivial to hit even ultimates. the only problem is that alistar's first few levels are quite miserable, and roaming.
amumu has great set-up for a ziggs with his bandage toss and ultimate combo being able to affect entire teams, letting you hit several people with your ultimate easily.

mage supports are pretty miserable to play with in the 2v2, as you have very little self-peel against more aggressive botlanes. annie somewhat makes up for it with her tibbers being great set-up for you to combo off.

marksmen supports are pretty miserable to play with in the 2v2, as you have very little self-peel against more aggressive botlanes, but ashe somewhat makes up for it due to her entire poking and trading pattern being filled with slows, making hitting abilities with ziggs very easy.
while bard has strong trading and great crowd controlling abilities for ziggs to bounce off of, his roaming playstyle is very suboptimal for ziggs, who loves the chaos of 2v2s in the botlane.
blitzcrank is downright one of the best supports you can pick with ziggs, due to his great pick potential, strong crowd control and preventing escapes with his ultimate silencing enemy players.

[jungle] brand jungle is weird to bounce off of, though his gank setups aren't the worst with a well aimed satchel charge to push your opponents towards him. objective fights with mid/jungle 2v2s are pretty terrible though.
[support] being a mage support with low range, terrible mobility, and bad self-peel makes laning with one awful as ziggs.

braum is really good at protecting a ziggs in 2v2s, and his passive isn't the worst, especially if you take the summon aery page with a bunch of attack speed. his ultimate is also really strong in teamfights, but ultimately isn't the best support you could pick with ziggs.
camille's aggressive, short trade nature, is a match made in heaven with ziggs, her ultimate locking down enemies making it easy to hit your own ultimate is great as well.
galio's knock-up + taunt combo is fantastic aoe crowd control for ziggs' abilities, especially your ultimate. his ultimate is also a great engage and peel tool for you.

bel'veth isn't the greatest jungler to have with ziggs, but her knock-up is pretty good at facilitating your abilities. otherwise, you're not really able to match her mobility and you can't support her much.
briar is much too aggressive for you to match her tempo, and her crowd control is a bit weak in conjunction with your abilities.
while cho'gath is a nice frontliner and his knock up is certainly a strong set up tool for you kit, it's just too unreliable to be a great support.
diana is a great jungler to have, as her ultimate and your ultimate have great synergy together, and your mid/jungle 2v2 is okay.
ekko doesn't really have reliable crowd control or a good 2v2 with you midlane, but a lucky stun grenade can be great for you, and you're able to push enemies into it.
elise is only useful for you if she manages to hit her stun, and you're otherwise not bursty enough in the early game to have great kill angles without crowd control.
evelynn's charm is pretty strong for you to combo off of, and her innate execution effects are very nice in conjunction with your chip damage.

fiddlesticks has really good crowd control for you to bounce off of in the form of his fear, silence and ultimate, making ultimates really easy to hit in fights and such. your early game mid/jungle 2v2 is pretty miserable though.
gragas has pretty strong crowd control to bounce off of for ziggs, but you should be careful of a gragas ultimate messing up your ultimates.
graves doesn't have any effective crowd control for you to synergise off of, nor do you have a great kit to facilitate him.
hecarim has fine crowd control, especially with his ultimate, but your mid/jungle 2v2 is pretty rough.
heimer being a mage support makes laning with him quite tough, but he's pretty strong against melee supports, letting him control the lane.
being a mage support with terrible mobility and rough self-peel is pretty rough with ziggs against aggressive botlanes, even if, theoretically, the poke sounds fine.
ivern has solid crowd control and his shield is really useful for ziggs, but your early game mid/jungle 2v2 is pretty rough and ivern prefers champions that use basic attacks more.
janna as an enchanter doesn't do much for you, and she will most likely leave you to fend for yourself as she roams, but her peel makes her bearable to play with.
jarvan is fantastic, his ultimate being perfect for ziggs' ultimate, as well as serving as a powerful frontliner and having great crowd control in the rest of his kit.
jax's stun is extremely powerful in conjunction with ziggs' kit as an engage tool, and your early mid/jungle 2v2 is very formidable as well.
karma as a mage support isn't all that potent, though her basic abilities having enough crowd control to affect someone for short enough moments to get your qs off makes it bearable.
karthus is pretty bad with ziggs, only making up for it with his wall's magic resistance reduction and executioner-style ultimate synergising with ziggs' chip damage.
[rhaast]
[shadow assassin]
kha'zix has nice ganks for ziggs due to his burst damage, but not much else.
kindred has nice ganks for ziggs due to her mark slowing enemy champions and her ult saving ziggs from a pinch in a teamfight, but not much else.
lee sin is a fine jungler, having a strong early game making the mid/jungle 2v2 alright and his kick being good peel or set-up for ziggs' ultimate.
leona's crowd control, innate aggression, and passive empowering ziggs' abilities, makes her the best support you can pick for ziggs as long as she remains in the lane for continued massacring.
lillia's sleep is a really strong set up tool for your ultimate, but is otherwise pretty lackluster.
lulu as an enchanter does not have much synergy with ziggs, but her polymorph and aggression make her bearable.
lux as a mage support with no mobility and poor peel makes her quite terrible to lane with as ziggs.
maokai's crowd control makes him amazing with ziggs, though you should be careful playing around maokai's knockback, so as to not accidentally miss your abilities due to it.
master yi has absolutely no crowd control in his kit, and his speed makes it hard for you to follow him, making him pretty anti-synergistic with you.
milio as an enchanter is pretty weak with ziggs, but his passive enhancing your abilities and his football kick working as fine peel isn't the worst.
morgana as a mage-like support makes her pretty miserable to play with ziggs, though her black shield and root makes it bearable.

nami as an enchanter immediately makes the lane somewhat rough, though nami's kit has a lot of synergy with ziggs such as empowering his abilities, and having fine enough peel and engage with her bubble and tsunami, making her one of the better enchanters to pick.
nautilus has fantastic crowd control with his entire kit, making him one of the best ziggs enablers, especially with his ultimate and your ultimate synergising amazingly.
while neeko in lane is somewhat rough due to her relatively low amount of crowd control and mobility, her ultimate is amazing when coordinated with yours.
neither champion fulfils any needs of the other.
nocturne is somewhat awkward to play around, but his fear and ultimate work quite well with your kit.
nunu has great synergy with ziggs due to his knock-up, root, as well as the slow on his ultimate, but it's simply not reliable enough.

ornn has really powerful crowd control with his dash and ultimate, being able to consistently hit your abilities during fights, and ornn being able to upgrade your rabadon's deathcap is another nice bonus.
pantheon support loves aggression, and his stun with press the attack empowering your abilities is amazing, though he falters in larger scale skirmishes and teamfights.

poppy's short trades as a support are great and deal a lot of damage, while being able to defend you with her grounding ability. her ultimate is also a great teamfighting tool, being able to knock up multiple people to set up your ultimate.

pyke has great engaging tools and crowd control, making your abilities easy to hit already, but his ultimate executing low-health enemies, something ziggs struggles with, and giving you extra gold to snowball even further, makes him top tier, though a pyke roaming elsewhere and leaving you to fend for yourself for minutes at a time is quite rough.
rammus has alright synergy with ziggs due to his knock-up and taunt locking someone down for several seconds, but isn't consistent enough to make it a must-pick.
rek'sai's knock-up is extremely reliable and very powerful with ziggs, as well as serving as a powerful frontline.
rell has very consistent and powerful crowd control, making your abilities very easy to hit during laning phase, and her ultimate makes your own ultimate very easy to land during teamfights.
renata is strange to classify, but her crowd control simply isn't enough for you, and she has relatively weak peel in lane, with her stat buff being much more useful for marksmen, than a mage.
though rengar does have a slow and root, they aren't really enough to justify being a 'synergistic pick' with ziggs.
sejuani's consistent crowd control with her charge, stun and ultimate makes her an amazing jungler with you, especially during teamfights.

senna makes your laning unplayable against any semblance of aggression. her peel is terrible, she doesn't support you much, and she has no mobility. you will simply get devoured in lane most of the time.

all of seraphine's basic abilities have little to no synergy for you. you have no shielding to empower her shielding effect, and your minefield is far too weak of a slow to empower her slow/root/stun. the only saving grace seraphine has is her ultimate being insanely powerful.

sett has quite strong crowd control with his ultimate and pull, and him being encouraged to play very aggressively is favourable for you, but his low range is quite abusable and makes him rough to skirmish and teamfight with.
shaco as an assassin doesn't really synergise well with ziggs, though your satchel can technically throw them into his boxes, creating small crowd control chains, which is somewhat respectable.
shyvana doesn't really work well with ziggs at all. though her ultimate could technically synergise with your own, it's not enough.
skarner's entire kit has a bunch of crowd control, synergising with your kit in many ways, especially his ultimate together with yours.
sona has terrible peel, weak early game and low mobility, making her a terrible pick with ziggs, even if her ultimate is a respectable form of crowd control.
swain's weak peel, unreliable crowd control, and preferred fighting style being selfish longer trades, makes him a pretty bad pick with ziggs.
soraka's unreliable crowd control and supporting style being entirely unfitting for ziggs makes her a pretty weak support for him.
as a jungler, sylas doesn't really mesh too well with ziggs, though his knock-up can be nice in some situations.
tahm kench's all-ins can be really powerful with his crowd control, and his ultimate being able to save you from death entirely is great.
taliyah's slows make it really easy to hit your abilities when she's ganking you, and your satchel works with taliyah's stone field, letting you stun and damage enemies on taliyah's behalf.
talon provides nothing special for ziggs, and ziggs doesn't do all that much for talon either.
taric's stun is amazing with ziggs, and his trading power empowering both himself and you makes him great.
thresh's hooks, crowd control, and being able to rescue you with lanterns makes him an amazing pick with ziggs, even though his teamfight engages aren't as powerful as others.

trundle has mostly slowing effects with his chomp and ice pillar, which do make your abilities easier to hit, but him being a relatively poor frontliner, with weak peel and wanting extended fights makes him not ideal.
twitch provides no crowd control to the team, and his preferred style of play being consistent roaming and leaving you to fend for yourself 1v2 makes him terrible with ziggs.
udyr's early game is not all that strong and his ganks aren't reliable enough with you to make him a good jungler for ziggs.
vel'koz's low mobility and horrendous peel makes him an atrocious pick with ziggs into aggressive lanes, even though their poke sounds great in theory.
vi's charge is strong enough for ziggs already, but her ultimate chaining with your own lets ziggs really shine.
viego's stun is okay, but him preferring extended skirmishes and resets meshes somewhat poorly with ziggs.
volibear has really strong ganks with ziggs due to his stun chaining into his slow, letting you continue the chain with your own satchel as well as landing other abilities.

warwick has many synergies with ziggs, from his blood trails encouraging an executioner-esque playstyle, his fear being able to affect multiple champions for your aoe abilities, and his suppress making your ultimate extremely easy to land, in addition to serving as a strong frontline to protect you.
wukong's damage is respectable enough, and his ultimate is great crowd control during teamfights for your entire kit to shine, but his first 5 levels aren't that synergistic with ziggs.
xerath's low mobility and near-nonexistent peel makes him a painful pick with ziggs against aggressive laners, even though their poke could be fantastic together.
xin zhao's powerful early game and knock-up makes him a nice enough jungler to have, though he becomes hard to follow through with further into the game outside of your ultimate.

yuumi's only beneficial effect for ziggs is her being able to restore your mana, but having no frontline to cover you, and no crowd control, with her kit favouring marksmen and fighters, makes her one of the worst picks you could play with ziggs.

zac's crowd control is great, and you are able to chain crowd control in quick succession with both of your kits, from his knock-up, to your satchel charge, to his pull forming very effective lethal combos.
though zilean's peel and ultimate can be pretty bad for ziggs, his slows and stuns are amazing set up for your abilities.
zyra's low range, mobility and weak peel makes her horrendous with ziggs.
though zoe is quite immobile and her peel is weak, her aggressive nature makes her a strong enough support to dominate lanes with bursty combos.

alistar's kit is incredible for fights in the botlane with ziggs, having so much crowd control that makes it trivial to hit even ultimates. the only problem is that alistar's first few levels are quite miserable, and roaming.
